Motion For A Court Order Striking Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jul-25-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff's Motion to Vacate Order of Sanctions issued on 6/25/2002 to Domenic J. Cannizzaro, Esq., in the amount of $200.00, is scheduled this day. There being no appearance or an objection tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted. Sanctions are ordered vacated. Moving party to submit a proposed order within five days. Proceedings reported by: Mary Ellen Scherer. (212)
